title: Delivery worker creates fresh HTTP client per cycle
description: delivery::run_worker creates a reqwest::Client at startup which is fine, but the inbox handler in server.rs creates a new reqwest::Client::new() for every Follow request to send the Accept. reqwest::Client is designed to be reused (connection pooling, cookie jar). Store one in AppState and share it.
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
